text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day after Seiun Sky miraculously takes the
Classic Triple Crown...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I arrive at my office to find a mountain of
cardboard boxes!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Ah, a fine morning to ya. I was just helping myself
to a bit of your office space.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that'd be the sea bream. Gramps says eat it
and you'll be "breaming" with joy.
choice_data_list: Your grandfather sent you all this?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
He sure did. But really, what am I supposed to do
with so much?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I mean, I won the Triple Crown, so of course Gramps is over the moon, but come on!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, he also sent me some stuff I've been
asking about for ages, like this bait and fishing
chair.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's right, Sky told me it was her grandfather's
dream for her to win in the Classics.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I know, right? It was such a close call, I tell ya. Just knew something fishy was going on...

text_block_list.name: Delivery Person
text_block_list.text:
Let's see... These boxes are for the school—huh?!
They're all addressed to this dorm... and to the
same person?!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Um, could I take a look at these boxes for a
second?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
"To Seiun Sky"... Oh, that's Gramps, all right.
Geez, look at all of this.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Um, I'm actually the Seiun Sky these are
addressed to. I'd love for you to send them to the
school, but instead of my dorm...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Talk about too close for comfort!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Imagine, if I had just woken up a minute later, I
would've been literally boxed in my room.
choice_data_list: ...So you put them in my office?
...So you put them in my office?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I can't thank you enough! ☆

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, gotta get back to opening all of these
up!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: You take care of the sea bream, Trainer!
choice_data_list: And do what exactly with it?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Welp, you gotta cook it while it's still fresh. So...
thanks in advance!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I pick up the fish and start heading to the kitchen
when I remember I didn't ask how she wanted it
cooked. So I turn back, and...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Yeah, thank you. Yup, uh-huh... Okay.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
But, Gramps, what am I supposed to do with this
bamboo rod? You don't expect me to actually
fish with it.
choice_data_list:
(Looks like she's on the phone with her
grandfather.)

text_block_list.name: Sky's Grandfather
text_block_list.text:
What're you talking about?! In your hands, you
could catch tuna or even a marlin with that thing!
Go on and surprise your ol' grandpa again!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Say what? You're out of your mind...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
All right. So you're saying if I fish up something
incredible with this bamboo rod, you'll come and
tousle my hair or whatever?

text_block_list.name: Sky's Grandfather
text_block_list.text:
Of course I would! You don't even gotta catch the
fish. I'm always in the mood to tousle that head of
yours!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Guess I've got no choice then, hehe. But don't
blame me if you throw your back out!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Oh, that reminds me, Gramps! The other day, I...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...I decide I can just slowly simmer the fish, and
turn back once again to head to the kitchen.
